description: A pink-and-blue tinted Western sketch-style image of a cowboy on a bucking horse in a desert with mesa rock formations and a lightning bolt. White text reads 'ARE YOU GOING TO COWBOY UP OR JUST LAY THERE AND BLEED?' with smaller white text listing 'JOIN.ICE.GOV', 'CBP.GOV/CAREERS' and 'USCIS.GOV/JOIN'.
notable_text: ARE YOU GOING TO COWBOY UP OR JUST LAY THERE AND BLEED?; JOIN.ICE.GOV; CBP.GOV/CAREERS; USCIS.GOV/JOIN
